headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Tyler Technologies, Raises Price Target to $425
summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   maintains Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $420 to $425.

headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Tyler Technologies, Maintains $420 Price Target
